CREATE TABLE test_time (hour BIGINT, minute BIGINT, second DOUBLE);
SELECT make_time(hour, minute, second) FROM test_time;
SELECT make_time(hh, mm, ss) FROM (SELECT hour as hh, minute as mm, second as ss FROM test_time WHERE hour >= 0 AND hour <= 23) AS subquery;
SELECT t1.hour, t1.minute, t1.second, make_time(t1.hour, t1.minute, t1.second) as time FROM test_time t1 WHERE t1.hour > 12;
SELECT DISTINCT make_time(t1.hour, t1.minute, t1.second), t2.some_column FROM test_time t1 JOIN another_table t2 ON t1.hour = t2.matching_hour;
WITH time_data AS (SELECT hour, minute, second FROM test_time WHERE hour BETWEEN 1 AND 23) SELECT make_time(hour, minute, second) FROM time_data;
